task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (expected user: root).

task_completion.description: Select the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active study shown in the OpenClinica interface (often in the top navigation or sidebar) is 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.
The Subject Matrix or View Subject page specifically for 'DM-101' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Access the scheduling interface for the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scheduling form or event list for 'Week 4 Follow-up' is open for subject DM-101.

task_completion.description: Schedule Cycle 2 of 'Week 4 Follow-up' for April 15, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Week 4 Follow-up' event (Cycle 2 / Occurrence 2) shows a start date of '2024-04-15' (or equivalent format like '15-Apr-2024') in the scheduling form or the saved subject event table.

task_completion.description: Schedule Cycle 3 of 'Week 4 Follow-up' for May 13, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Week 4 Follow-up' event (Cycle 3 / Occurrence 3) shows a start date of '2024-05-13' (or equivalent format like '13-May-2024') in the scheduling form or the saved subject event table.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenClinica web application, not terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent entered the dates into the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dates are entered into OpenClinica form fields or displayed in OpenClinica data tables, not just typed into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved or scheduled the events rather than just filling out the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a confirmation message of successful scheduling, or the subject matrix/event list shows the events as 'Scheduled' with the correct dates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024 (Phase II Diabetes Trial). Subject Label: DM-101. Event Definition: Week 4 Follow-up. Cycle 2 Expected Date: 2024-04-15. Cycle 3 Expected Date: 2024-05-13. Note: Date formats in the UI may vary (e.g., DD-MMM-YYYY).
